body: Marcus, thanks for the note — always good to hear from you. I've been following [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) closely over the past few weeks and think there's a real story there around distributed load balancing at the edge of the grid; the team's technical depth is frankly rare at this stage. I know [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) tends to move fast on seed rounds when the fundamentals line up this cleanly, so I'd love to get something on the calendar before the end of April. Would you be open to a quick call with me and the founder sometime next week to compare notes on valuation framing? Let me know what works on your end.
